# Vue 3 — Generic Reference

> **Extension project?** Use `browser-extension-developer` skill — it includes Vue patterns specific to WXT/MV3 UI contexts.

Load sub-files on demand (not all at once):

| Working on… | Load |
|---|---|
| `.vue` components | [references/components.md](references/components.md) |
| `use*` composables | [references/composables.md](references/composables.md) |
| `.spec.ts` tests | [references/testing.md](references/testing.md) |
| TypeScript / generics | [references/typescript.md](references/typescript.md) |
| `ref`, `watch`, `computed` | [references/reactivity.md](references/reactivity.md) |
| `provide` / `inject` | [references/provide-inject.md](references/provide-inject.md) |
| Custom directives | [references/directives.md](references/directives.md) |
| Hydration / edge cases | [references/gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |

Context7: `/vuejs/vue` · `/vueuse/vueuse`
